emails.subject: Re: Auction Procedures
emails.body: I'm afraid I disagree with Justin but prefer not to do so publicly. It seems to me we need a verifiable end time for the Auction Period and should choose a time and a time zone that makes sense for the traders and counterparties (presumably UK for EnBank but Central for emissions credits). Forwarded by Mark Taylor/HOU/ECT on 02/15/2000 01:47 PM Justin Boyd 02/15/2000 11:54 AM
